data.title: West Main Self Storage purchased 2014 shares of Strategy perpetual preferred stock for $200,000.
data.description: BitcoinTreasuries.NET reported on the X platform that West Main Self Storage purchased 2,014 shares of Strategy Perpetual Preferred Stock (STRC) for $200,000. The transaction was financed through an unsecured, non-recourse, interest-only loan with a fixed interest rate of 6%.

data.title: Gate launched its 74th Contract Points Airdrop, with a single account earning nearly $29.
data.description: On-chain data shows that the 74th Gate.com SUI airdrop event is underway. SUI's 24-hour high was $1.4482, with a current market capitalization of approximately $5.18 billion. This airdrop event yielded a single account a profit of nearly $29. It is understood that this airdrop was divided into two prize pools: users holding ≥ 40 Gate.com SUI received a 100 USDT position trial voucher, consuming 20 Gate.com SUI received ≥ 140 Gate.com SUI received 20 Gate.com SUI received 15 Gate.com SUI airdrop event number 75, offering 50 WLD & 100 USDT position trial vouchers per person, will begin on January 30th at 18:00 (UTC+8). Join now for a chance to claim rewards tomorrow.

data.title: Following 8 FOMC meetings in 2025, Bitcoin experienced 7 price drops, with an average decline of 14%.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ali, in 7 out of 8 FOMC meetings in 2025, BTC experienced a significant pullback after each meeting, with an average drop of 14%. Only one meeting saw a brief upward reaction afterward.

data.title: Copper Price Surge Boosts Trader's Profits to $2.2 Million
data.description:
A prominent trader has seen their account profits increase to $2.2 million due to rising copper prices. According to ChainCatcher, the trader's total holdings have reached $49.2 million, with significant gains from copper futures contracts. The account's profits grew by approximately $1.1 million compared to the previous day.

Key positions include a $21.12 million stake in the Nasdaq 100 index, with an average price of $25,443.47 and a liquidation price of $23,421, resulting in a profit of around $530,000 (20%). The copper futures mapping contract holds a position of approximately $18.97 million, with an average price of $5.91 and a liquidation price of $5.5, yielding a profit of about $1.22 million (44%).

Other holdings include a $2.87 million position in Palantir Technologies, with an average price of $165.47 and a liquidation price of $152, resulting in a loss of approximately $2.36 million (-138%). Additionally, there is a $2.66 million position in Micron Technology, with an average price of $343 and a liquidation price of $325, generating a profit of around $600,000 (74%).

The trader focuses on U.S. stocks and on-chain precious metals, having previously been the largest long position holder in on-chain gold. They have since closed their gold positions and shifted their strategy to concentrate on the Nasdaq index and copper prices, with nearly $40 million invested in these areas.

data.title: Whale Closes $4.5 Million BTC Short Position with Profit
data.description:
A whale recently closed a $4.5 million short position on Bitcoin, securing a profit of $84,900. According to ChainCatcher, the account currently shows an unrealized loss of $147,000.

The address is characterized by high-frequency trading behavior, often employing a 10x leverage strategy. This approach is flexible but indicates a high-risk preference.

data.title: Bitcoin Faces Potential Selling Pressure Amid High Cost Basis
data.description: More than half of the invested Bitcoin supply has a cost basis exceeding $88,000, which is above the current market prices. According to NS3.AI, this scenario increases the risk of selling pressure if Bitcoin's key support levels are breached. The heightened vulnerability could impact Bitcoin's price stability in the near term.

source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/kazakhstan-cracking-capital-flight-crypto/

data.title: Moutai's Price Surge Attributed to Speculation
data.description: Analyst @ai_9684xtpa posted on X that the recent increase in Moutai's stock price is reportedly linked to speculative reasons. The discussion humorously referenced a conversation with Elon Musk about colonizing Mars, where Musk stated, 'I need more time.' This was humorously translated domestically as 'I want Moutai,' suggesting a playful connection between the two topics.

data.title: Story Protocol and OpenLedger Introduce New AI Training Data Copyright Standard
data.description:
Story Protocol and OpenLedger have jointly announced the launch of a new standard for copyright clearance and automatic payment to creators concerning AI training data. According to Foresight News, this standard enables AI systems to train on authorized intellectual property while cryptographically proving IP usage, enforcing licensing terms during runtime, and automatically distributing royalties to rights holders when copyrighted content is used in AI activities or outputs.

Within this standard, Story Protocol serves as the normative registration center for intellectual property, defining ownership, licensing terms, derivative permissions, and economic rights in a machine-readable format. OpenLedger acts as the AI execution and verification layer, enforcing licenses during training and inference, cryptographically verifying IP usage, and automatically routing payments when authorized content contributes to model behavior or AI-generated derivatives.

data.title: Bitcoin Transfer from Cumberland DRW to Anonymous Address
data.description: A transfer of 79 Bitcoin, valued at approximately $5.88 million, was made from Cumberland DRW to an anonymous address at 17:45. According to ChainCatcher, the receiving address begins with bc1q8q62.

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks generally fell in pre-market trading in the US, with Strategy (MSTR) down 1.94%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, crypto stocks generally fell in pre-market trading in the US. Strategy (MSTR) fell 1.94%, MARA Holdings (MARA) fell 1.43%, Sharplink Gaming (SBET) fell 0.2%, BitMine (BMNR) rose 1.02%, and DeFi Development Corp (DFDV) fell 3.3%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stocks and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: USDC Treasury Reduces Circulating Supply with Token Burn
data.description: The USDC Treasury has conducted a significant token burn, destroying 50 million USDC tokens on the Ethereum blockchain. According to NS3.AI, this action decreases the circulating supply of USDC stablecoins. Token burns are often indicative of treasury management strategies or adjustments in the stablecoin supply.

data.title: A whale's revolving loan purchase of XVS resulted in the liquidation of 287,000 units, leading to a loss of $1.09 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, the price of XVS fell 40% in one day, from $5.3 to $3.1. A certain whale (0x1c2...f5df) borrowed 1.4 million USDT through Venus to pledge XVS and continued to buy, accumulating 532,000 XVS worth $2.81 million. Affected by the price drop, this whale had 287,000 XVS liquidated in the flash crash one hour ago to repay 930,000 USDT at a liquidation price of $3.23, currently incurring a loss of $1.09 million. The address's current position health ratio is 1.07; if XVS continues to fall below $3.2, its position will face further liquidation.

data.title: MetaPlanet to Raise $137 Million for Bitcoin Acquisition
data.description: MetaPlanet (MTPLF) is set to raise $137 million through a new stock issuance and warrants. According to Odaily, the funds will be used to purchase additional Bitcoin. This move aligns with the company's strategy to expand its cryptocurrency holdings.

data.title: Guizhou Moutai Denies Involvement in SpaceX IPO Funding
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). Guizhou Moutai has refuted claims that it participated in the Series A funding round for SpaceX's initial public offering. According to a report by Shanghai Securities News, rumors circulated in the market suggesting that Guizhou Moutai confirmed its involvement in the SpaceX IPO funding. However, representatives from Guizhou Moutai have clarified that this information is false.

data.title: Whale accumulated nearly $7M XAUT from Bybit
data.description:
Bybit sent out several XAUT transactions to a single whale, now sitting on a tokenized gold portfolio of nearly $7M.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/whale-accumulated-nearly-7m-xaut-from-bybit/

data.title: The Ethereum Foundation and Polkadot-related organizations participated in the Nanyang Technological University Blockchain Master's Capstone Showcase Day.
data.description: The Ethereum Foundation, Polkadot developer relations partners PaperMoon, 0G, SNZ, and other blockchain-related organizations were recently invited to participate in the Nanyang Technological University (NTU) Capstone Project Showcase Day. This project, based on NTU's Master of Science in Blockchain (MSBT) program, requires students to collaborate with companies or institutions over 3–6 months to conduct practical projects focusing on real-world blockchain applications or solutions.
